postToolUse.powershell: $hookTmpRoot = if ($env:CONTROL_PLANE_HOOK_TMP_ROOT) { $env:CONTROL_PLANE_HOOK_TMP_ROOT } elseif ($env:CONTROL_PLANE_TMP_ROOT) { Join-Path $env:CONTROL_PLANE_TMP_ROOT 'hooks' } else { '/var/tmp/control-plane/hooks' }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $hookTmpRoot | Out-Null; $hookScript = Join-Path $HOME '.copilot/hooks/postToolUse/main.mjs'; if (-not $env:NODE_COMPILE_CACHE) { $env:NODE_COMPILE_CACHE = Join-Path $hookTmpRoot 'node-compile-cache' }; if (-not $env:NPM_CONFIG_CACHE) { $env:NPM_CONFIG_CACHE = Join-Path $hookTmpRoot 'npm-cache' }; node $hookScript
